title: Custom Board Property
excerpt: Rather than requiring a Constant or Variable to be replicated on every column, the equivalent of a board global property would be useful especially in formulas.

posts.author: edmonds (Edmond Shapiro)
posts.cookedHtml: Rather than requiring a Constant or Variable to be replicated on every column, the equivalent of a board global property would be useful especially in formulas.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @edmonds,

Would you be happy to elaborate a little further on your request here? We want to make sure we are completely across your request

posts.author: edmonds (Edmond Shapiro)
posts.cookedHtml: Sure, let’s say that we have a multiple boards each dedicated to different project. “project name” is an example of a constant value that could be used in a formula on each board. Perhaps you wanted to rank projects so a priority constant might be utilized in formulas on each board. Currently this is all possible by creating a formula column and having that constant appear as a fixed value on each item. But that seems unnecessary if there were a way to just associate constant/variables as a custom global parameter on each board.
